title: Volunteer Cleanup Day
description: Annual common-area cleanup. Gloves, bags, and refreshments provided.

title: Community Pool Opens
description: Opening day for the 2026 swim season.

title: Memorial Day Cookout
description: Neighborhood potluck cookout. Burgers and hot dogs provided by the social committee.

title: Monthly Board Meeting
description: Open to all residents. Agenda posted on the documents page.

description: Board elections, 2026 budget review, and open floor for questions.

title: Independence Day Bike Parade
description: Kids' decorated bike parade followed by popsicles at the pavilion.
